name: Explicit Party Game Fixture
description: Two to four players take turns rolling dice and moving a token across connected board spaces. Landing on a space can add or remove coins, grant an item, or start a four-player minigame. Players spend coins to buy stars from a star space. Items can modify a dice roll or move a player to another board space. After a configured number of turns, the player with the most stars wins; coins break tied star totals. The same match supports local multiplayer and online multiplayer.
